name: Cucumber Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the cucumber and onion, then drain well.
2. Pat the mixture dry with paper towels.
3. Combine all remaining ingredients in a bowl.
4. Stir until everything is blended together.
5. Add the grated cucumber and onion to the mixture.
6. Stir again until fully combined.
Yield: about 2-2/3 cups
